title: Repurposing of tamoxifen ameliorates CLN3 and CLN7 disease phenotype

paper_analysis.summary: The study repurposes tamoxifen to reduce Gb3 accumulation and improve lysosomal and neurological phenotypes in CLN3/CLN7 Batten disease models via TFEB activation.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: No externally deposited dataset is reported. The paper appears to rely on in-article experimental results without a downloadable data package.
